observed_frequency.description: Observed frequency (f_i) for each category of number of defective soldering points (0, 1, 2, 3, 4 or more) on circuit boards, N=33.

expected_frequency.description: Expected frequency (E_i) under the Poisson distribution for each category of number of defective soldering points (0, 1, 2, 3, 4 or more).

alpha.description: Significance level given for the chi-squared goodness-of-fit test.
